name: Chicken and Orzo Salad with Three Cheeses
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained and coarsely chopped
1 cup Diced mozzarella or provolone cheese
1 large Ripe tomato, seeded and diced
1/3 cup Pitted, coarsely chopped Kalamata olives
1/4 cup Packed fresh basil leaves, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook orzo according to package directions. Drain and rinse with cold water. Drain again.
2. In a large bowl, combine orzo, chicken and dressing. Toss well.
3. Add artichokes, mozzarella cheese, tomatoes, olives and basil. Toss well.
4. Add feta and Parmesan cheeses. Toss lightly.
5. Cover and chill at least 30 minutes or up to 6 hours before serving.
6. Serve on salad greens. Season with freshly ground black pepper to taste.
